title: Codex app 26.609
body:
## New features

- Added rate-limit reset banking for Plus and Pro users, including one free reset at launch and referral invitations for earning more during the current promotion. Eligible Business members can invite coworkers to earn shared workspace credits through a separate referral program.

- Added Developer mode for Browser use in Chrome and the Codex in-app browser. It gives Codex controlled Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) access for performance profiling and deeper debugging of network traffic, console output, runtime errors, and page state.

- Added the /init command to the app composer for creating project instructions with the same initialization workflow as the Codex CLI.

- Added customizable macOS Dock icons with light and dark Codex variants.

- Added Computer Use for Enterprise users outside the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland.

- Added support for configuring per-app access controls for Computer Use on Windows.

- Added an Unread chats section to the command menu, with the most recently updated unread chat selected by default.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Made Browser use up to 2x faster through CDP and DOM snapshot optimizations that reduce browser round trips.

- Made command, browser, integration, and source activity summaries easier to understand, and improved how completed chats present files, automations, and other durable output.

- Improved plugin management by including workspace plugins, refreshing plugin state more reliably after installation or removal, and letting you upload a new version of an already-shared plugin without changing its access.

- Improved usage-limit errors with inline plan and workspace guidance, including reset timing when available.

- Added Cmd+Enter and Ctrl+Enter as shortcuts for submitting custom approval feedback.

- Fixed Browser use download handling and improved Developer mode recovery and diagnostics.

- Fixed scheduled automations so they honor the selected approval mode, and fixed manual project ordering, Browser tab dragging, MCP app sizing after right-pane transitions, and clickable ChatGPT thread mentions.

- Fixed issues affecting background agent tab restoration, commit and pull request message generation, sidebar pull request status updates, Codex Mobile QR pairing, remote-control MFA, remote SSH installation and connection, updater prompts, and overlay positioning at non-default zoom levels.

- Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

translation.bodyEn:
## New features

- Added rate-limit reset banking for Plus and Pro users, including one free reset at launch and referral invitations for earning more during the current promotion. Eligible Business members can invite coworkers to earn shared workspace credits through a separate referral program.

- Added Developer mode for Browser use in Chrome and the Codex in-app browser. It gives Codex controlled Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) access for performance profiling and deeper debugging of network traffic, console output, runtime errors, and page state.

- Added the /init command to the app composer for creating project instructions with the same initialization workflow as the Codex CLI.

- Added customizable macOS Dock icons with light and dark Codex variants.

- Added Computer Use for Enterprise users outside the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, and Switzerland.

- Added support for configuring per-app access controls for Computer Use on Windows.

- Added an Unread chats section to the command menu, with the most recently updated unread chat selected by default.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Made Browser use up to 2x faster through CDP and DOM snapshot optimizations that reduce browser round trips.

- Made command, browser, integration, and source activity summaries easier to understand, and improved how completed chats present files, automations, and other durable output.

- Improved plugin management by including workspace plugins, refreshing plugin state more reliably after installation or removal, and letting you upload a new version of an already-shared plugin without changing its access.

- Improved usage-limit errors with inline plan and workspace guidance, including reset timing when available.

- Added Cmd+Enter and Ctrl+Enter as shortcuts for submitting custom approval feedback.

- Fixed Browser use download handling and improved Developer mode recovery and diagnostics.

- Fixed scheduled automations so they honor the selected approval mode, and fixed manual project ordering, Browser tab dragging, MCP app sizing after right-pane transitions, and clickable ChatGPT thread mentions.

- Fixed issues affecting background agent tab restoration, commit and pull request message generation, sidebar pull request status updates, Codex Mobile QR pairing, remote-control MFA, remote SSH installation and connection, updater prompts, and overlay positioning at non-default zoom levels.

- Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
translation.bodyZh:
## 新功能

- 为 Plus 和 Pro 用户增加了速率限制重置银行功能，包括发布时的一次免费重置，以及在当前推广期间通过推荐邀请获得更多重置次数。符合条件的 Business 成员可以邀请同事通过单独的推荐计划赚取共享工作区积分。

- 为 Chrome 和 Codex 应用内浏览器增加了浏览器使用的开发者模式。它赋予 Codex 受控的 Chrome DevTools 协议（CDP）访问权限，用于性能分析和更深入的网络流量、控制台输出、运行时错误和页面状态调试。

- 在应用编辑器中增加了 /init 命令，用于创建项目指令，其初始化工作流程与 Codex CLI 相同。

- 增加了可定制的 macOS Dock 图标，提供浅色和深色 Codex 变体。

- 为欧洲经济区、英国和瑞士以外的 Enterprise 用户增加了计算机使用功能。

- 增加了对 Windows 上计算机使用功能的按应用访问控制配置的支持。

- 在命令菜单中增加了未读聊天部分，默认选中最近更新的未读聊天。

## 性能改进和错误修复

- 通过 CDP 和 DOM 快照优化，减少了浏览器往返次数，使浏览器使用速度提升高达 2 倍。

- 使命令、浏览器、集成和源活动摘要更易于理解，并改进了已完成聊天呈现文件、自动化和其他持久输出的方式。

- 改进了插件管理，包括包含工作区插件，在安装或移除后更可靠地刷新插件状态，并允许您上传已共享插件的新版本而不更改其访问权限。

- 改进了使用限制错误，提供内联计划和工作区指导，包括可用时的重置时间。

- 增加了 Cmd+Enter 和 Ctrl+Enter 作为提交自定义审批反馈的快捷键。

- 修复了浏览器使用的下载处理，并改进了开发者模式的恢复和诊断。

- 修复了计划自动化，使其遵循选定的审批模式，并修复了手动项目排序、浏览器标签页拖拽、右侧面板切换后的 MCP 应用大小、可点击的 ChatGPT 线程提及。

- 修复了影响后台代理标签页恢复、提交和拉取请求消息生成、侧边栏拉取请求状态更新、Codex Mobile QR 配对、远程控制 MFA、远程 SSH 安装和连接、更新程序提示以及非默认缩放级别下覆盖层定位的问题。

- 其他性能改进和错误修复。

title: WorkBuddy 5.0.4
body:

title: Codex app 26.608
body:
## New features

- Added Import to Codex flows for importing supported setup from Claude Code and Claude Cowork, including during onboarding.

- Revamped plugins screen with separate tabs, marketplace and category filters, keyboard navigation, and clearer install actions.

- Expanded Settings search to find options from more panels, including Git and pets.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Fixed goal timer overlap in narrow layouts.

- Reduced unread notifications while an active goal continues running.

- Kept review diff ordering consistent with the file tree.

- Improved window rendering on systems that don’t support translucent backdrops, including Windows 10.

- Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

- Revamped plugins screen with separate tabs, marketplace and category filters, keyboard navigation, and clearer install actions.

- Expanded Settings search to find options from more panels, including Git and pets.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- 重新设计了插件界面，包含独立标签页、市场和分类筛选器、键盘导航以及更清晰的安装操作。

title: ChatGPT for iOS 1.2026.153
body:
## New features

- Added support for choosing a branch, creating a worktree, and running an environment setup script for new threads.

- Added a Codex profile screen with usage stats and token activity charts.

- Added /goal support for creating and managing goals from Codex Mobile.

- Added inline review comments when viewing changed files.

- Added support for asking in side chat from selected transcript text.

- Added support for editing the latest sent prompt.

## Improvements and bug fixes

- Improved attachment support on Windows hosts.

- Skills and plugins now appear directly inline in the composer.

- Improved side chat and queued prompt visibility while a thread is running.

- Improved message styling, navigation, tool activity, Face ID behavior, archived-thread browsing, and thread UI polish.

title: Codex app updates 26.602
body:
## New features

- Added activity insights and share cards to the Profile section. You can review Codex usage highlights and save a profile card; sharing is available on consumer ChatGPT plans.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Improved Computer Use startup readiness and appshot error reporting.

- Fixed browser and review UI issues, including fullscreen browser composer controls, hex color swatches, terminal scrollbar alignment, and animated diff stat alignment.

- Expanded onboarding with more role choices so Codex can tailor first-run suggestions more accurately.

- Fixed configuration writes after plugin installation.

- Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

translation.bodyEn:
## New features

- Added activity insights and share cards to the Profile section. You can review Codex usage highlights and save a profile card; sharing is available on consumer ChatGPT plans.

## Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Improved Computer Use startup readiness and appshot error reporting.

- Fixed browser and review UI issues, including fullscreen browser composer controls, hex color swatches, terminal scrollbar alignment, and animated diff stat alignment.

- Expanded onboarding with more role choices so Codex can tailor first-run suggestions more accurately.

- Fixed configuration writes after plugin installation.

- Additional performance improvements and bug fixes.
translation.bodyZh:
## 新功能

- 在个人资料部分新增了活动洞察和分享卡片。您可以查看 Codex 使用亮点并保存个人资料卡片；消费者 ChatGPT 套餐支持分享。

## 性能改进和错误修复

- 改进了 Computer Use 启动就绪状态和应用截图错误报告。

- 修复了浏览器和审查 UI 问题，包括全屏浏览器编辑器控件、十六进制颜色样本、终端滚动条对齐以及动画差异统计对齐。

- 扩展了入门引导，提供更多角色选择，使 Codex 能更准确地定制首次运行建议。

- 修复了插件安装后的配置写入问题。

- 其他性能改进和错误修复。

title: WorkBuddy 5.0.0
body:
- 新增 Teams 团队协作能力，支持创建项目、邀请成员、任务协同与权限管理

- 新增项目计划看板，支持待办创建、状态流转和批量操作

- 新增项目资产库（网盘），支持文件上传、文件夹管理、版本历史与任务内引用

- 新增项目外部数据源接入，支持定时导入与 Webhook 事件触发

- 新增项目动态时间线，展示成员操作记录与待办状态变更

- 新增项目级技能、专家、连接器和指令配置，按角色权限管控编辑能力

- 新增任务协作对话，支持多成员实时协同、队列派发与排序

- 新增任务流转能力，支持将任务移交给其他成员继续处理

- 新增消息中心，支持项目邀请、审批、动态等通知聚合

- 新增腾讯文档连接器深度集成，支持文件夹导入、搜索、上传进度管理

- 新增 HTML / 视频 / 图片等多类型产物预览能力

- 新增助理面板，支持创建和管理自定义助理

- 新增锁屏远程能力，支持长时间任务在锁屏状态下保持连接

- 优化 replay session 性能，引入分批写盘与分片让步

- 优化上下文压缩策略，修复压缩过程中消息错误透传及动画挂起

- 优化沙箱安全策略，修复授权超时后会话卡住无法停止的问题

- 优化连接器授权流程，修复飞书 CLI 连接器启动后卡连接中的问题

- 优化自动化任务体验，修复生效期清空不生效与补跑误显示问题

- 修复队列派发与 compact 历史链相关的状态同步问题

- 修复任务完成后误显示「用户已取消」的问题

- 修复任务标题语言偶现英文及 replay 后无响应的问题

- 修复切换账号登录后乐享知识库仍为上一账号的问题

- 修复产物预览视频文件卡死及 HTML 产物源码展示异常的问题

- 修复上传附件时二进制数据塞入 prompt 及文件 URI 未回写的问题

- 修复沙箱拦截弹窗在切换任务时未清除的问题

- 修复深色主题下多处弹窗与面板的样式异常

- 修复 Windows 窗口最大化时布局不自适应的问题

translation.bodyEn:
- Added Teams collaboration capability, supporting project creation, member invitation, task collaboration, and permission management

- Added project plan board, supporting todo creation, status transitions, and batch operations

- Added project asset library (cloud drive), supporting file upload, folder management, version history, and in-task references

- Added external data source integration for projects, supporting scheduled imports and Webhook event triggers

- Added project activity timeline, displaying member operation records and todo status changes

- Added project-level skills, experts, connectors, and instruction configurations, with role-based permission control for editing

- Added task collaboration chat, supporting real-time multi-member collaboration, queue dispatching, and sorting

- Added task transfer capability, allowing tasks to be handed over to other members for continued processing

- Added message center, aggregating notifications for project invitations, approvals, activities, etc.

- Added deep integration with Tencent Docs connector, supporting folder import, search, and upload progress management

- Added preview capability for multiple output types such as HTML, video, and images

- Added assistant panel, supporting creation and management of custom assistants

- Added lock screen remote capability, maintaining connection for long-running tasks even when the screen is locked

- Optimized replay session performance, introducing batch disk writes and chunked yielding

- Optimized context compression strategy, fixing message error passthrough and animation suspension during compression

- Optimized sandbox security policy, fixing the issue where sessions stuck after authorization timeout and could not be stopped

- Optimized connector authorization flow, fixing the issue where Feishu CLI connector stuck during connection startup

- Optimized automation task experience, fixing issues where effective period clearing did not work and rerun display errors

- Fixed state synchronization issues related to queue dispatching and compact history chains

- Fixed the issue where 'User cancelled' was incorrectly displayed after task completion

- Fixed the issue where task titles occasionally appeared in English and replay had no response

- Fixed the issue where Lexiang knowledge base still showed the previous account after switching accounts

- Fixed the issue where video files froze during output preview and HTML output source code displayed abnormally

- Fixed the issue where binary data was inserted into prompts when uploading attachments and file URIs were not written back

- Fixed the issue where sandbox interception popups were not cleared when switching tasks

- Fixed style anomalies in multiple popups and panels under dark theme

- Fixed the issue where the layout did not adapt when maximizing the window on Windows

title: Build and deploy websites with Sites
body:
Sites is now available in preview in the Codex app. Use the Sites plugin to create, save, deploy, and inspect websites, dashboards, internal tools, web apps, and games hosted by OpenAI.

Open Sites in the app sidebar to return to your projects and manage hosted environment variables and secrets.

ChatGPT Business workspaces include Sites by default. ChatGPT Enterprise admins can enable Sites for the appropriate roles through role-based access control (RBAC).

translation.titleEn: Build and deploy websites with Sites
translation.bodyEn:
Sites is now available in preview in the Codex app. Use the Sites plugin to create, save, deploy, and inspect websites, dashboards, internal tools, web apps, and games hosted by OpenAI.

Open Sites in the app sidebar to return to your projects and manage hosted environment variables and secrets.

ChatGPT Business workspaces include Sites by default. ChatGPT Enterprise admins can enable Sites for the appropriate roles through role-based access control (RBAC).
translation.titleZh: 使用 Sites 构建和部署网站
translation.bodyZh:
Sites 现已在 Codex 应用中提供预览版。使用 Sites 插件可以创建、保存、部署和检查由 OpenAI 托管的网站、仪表板、内部工具、Web 应用和游戏。

在应用侧边栏中打开 Sites 即可返回您的项目并管理托管的环境变量和密钥。

ChatGPT Business 工作区默认包含 Sites。ChatGPT Enterprise 管理员可以通过基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）为相应角色启用 Sites。

title: ChatGPT for iOS 1.2026.146
body:
## New features

- Added an optional Face ID or passcode lock for Codex.

- Added a new settings screen for choosing Queue or Steer as the default follow-up behavior and toggling line wrapping for code diffs.

- Added support for connecting to Windows machines over SSH.

## Improvements and bug fixes

- Added support for /side  to start a side conversation with an initial question.

- Improved follow-up prompts, the Codex home screen, and viewing changed files.

- Fixed issues with reconnecting, archiving threads, loading tasks, and connecting to hosts.

translation.bodyEn:
## New features

- Added an optional Face ID or passcode lock for Codex.

- Added a new settings screen for choosing Queue or Steer as the default follow-up behavior and toggling line wrapping for code diffs.

- Added support for connecting to Windows machines over SSH.

## Improvements and bug fixes

- Added support for /side  to start a side conversation with an initial question.

- Improved follow-up prompts, the Codex home screen, and viewing changed files.

- Fixed issues with reconnecting, archiving threads, loading tasks, and connecting to hosts.
translation.bodyZh:
## 新功能

- 为 Codex 增加了可选的 Face ID 或密码锁。

- 新增设置界面，可选择 Queue 或 Steer 作为默认后续行为，并切换代码差异的换行显示。

- 增加了通过 SSH 连接 Windows 机器的支持。

## 改进与错误修复

- 支持使用 /side 以初始问题开始侧边对话。

- 改进了后续提示、Codex 主屏幕以及查看已更改文件的功能。

- 修复了重新连接、归档线程、加载任务以及连接主机的问题。

title: Use Codex with Amazon Bedrock
body: Codex can now use supported OpenAI models available through Amazon Bedrock. Configure Amazon Bedrock as your model provider to run Codex locally with AWS-managed authentication, account controls, and billing.

translation.bodyEn: Codex can now use supported OpenAI models available through Amazon Bedrock. Configure Amazon Bedrock as your model provider to run Codex locally with AWS-managed authentication, account controls, and billing.
translation.titleZh: 在 Amazon Bedrock 上使用 Codex
translation.bodyZh: Codex 现在可以使用通过 Amazon Bedrock 提供的受支持的 OpenAI 模型。将 Amazon Bedrock 配置为模型提供商，即可在本地运行 Codex，并享受 AWS 管理的身份验证、账户控制和计费功能。

translation.bodyEn:
- Optimized display after content_filter hit: UI no longer shows filtered thinking and response content, and provides more friendly prompt text

- Fixed issue where ardot MCP tool was incorrectly injected into non-creative design modes

- Fixed issue where skill dropdown options were not displayed in the automation task popup

- Fixed issue where the domestic version integration guide link defaulted to redirecting to English documentation
translation.bodyZh:
- 优化 content_filter 命中后的展示，UI 不再展示被过滤的思考与回答内容，并提供更友好的提示文案

- 修复 ardot MCP 工具被错误注入到非创意设计模式的问题

- 修复自动化任务弹窗内技能下拉选项不显示的问题

- 修复国内版集成指南链接默认跳转英文文档的问题

title: WorkBuddy 4.24.3
body:
- 优化会话列表，隐藏专家团子成员与展开箭头，列表更聚焦

- 优化 Windows 自定义菜单栏 logo 与侧边栏卡片样式，对齐设计稿

- 优化分享文件审核失败的错误提示文案

- 修复用户忽略新版本提示后无法再次手动检查更新的问题

- 修复部分场景下技能偶现安装失败的问题

- 修复自定义模型请求参数问题导致可能请求失败

- 修复输入框工具栏与悬浮问答的层叠错乱、遮挡输出内容的问题

- 修复界面权限模式与实际进程权限模式不同步的问题

translation.bodyEn:
- Optimized conversation list, hiding expert group members and expand arrow for a more focused list

- Optimized Windows custom menu bar logo and sidebar card style to align with design

- Optimized error prompt text for file sharing audit failure

- Fixed issue where users couldn't manually check for updates after ignoring new version prompt

- Fixed occasional skill installation failure in some scenarios

- Fixed potential request failure due to custom model request parameter issues

- Fixed z-order disorder between input box toolbar and floating Q&A, which obscured output content

- Fixed synchronization issue between UI permission mode and actual process permission mode

- 修复部分场景下技能偶现安装失败的问题

- 修复自定义模型请求参数问题导致可能请求失败

- 修复输入框工具栏与悬浮问答的层叠错乱、遮挡输出内容的问题

- 修复界面权限模式与实际进程权限模式不同步的问题

title: WorkBuddy 4.24.2
body:
- 新增微信分享、项目邀请页与 OAuth 应用管理

- 新增侧边栏折叠按钮与置顶/归档/筛选交互

- 新增输入框成员栏折叠按钮，子 agent 视图头部更紧凑、产物入口跟随输出末尾展示

- 新增 MITM 代理环境下 HTTPS 信任系统 CA

- 新增工具调用循环检测黑名单，提升异常工具调用的拦截能力

- 优化成长计划入口副标题为「领取 Buddy 赚积分」

- 优化微信 ClawBot 消息支持 Markdown 渲染

- 优化企业账号不限量积分的显示样式

- 优化登录页主按钮视觉，统一为黑色

- 优化技能描述优先级，优先采用 SKILL.md frontmatter 中的值

- 优化产物分享流程，改为按需上传并补充加载提示

- 优化自动化任务峰值调度，避免同一时间集中触发造成卡顿

- 优化自动化会话跳过标题/摘要生成，避免不必要的模型调用

- 优化启动性能，延迟加载非必要工具

- 优化欢迎页暗色主题 Logo 与活动入口展示

- 修复执行中会话取消后状态未收尾、无法再次中止的问题

- 修复取消后重发消息溯源不准的问题

- 修复自定义专家团 Lead 头像裂图的问题

- 修复连接器菜单在视口空间不足时被裁剪的问题

- 修复 macOS / Linux 僵尸进程清理误杀其他 Electron 应用的问题

- 修复非 ASCII 路径下自定义模型配置读取失败的问题

- 修复远端永久下线模型未走自愈降级的问题

- 修复乐享 MCP 与用户自定义 MCP 冲突的问题

- 修复 ima 选择文件时无权限文件无法勾选的问题

- 修复切换专家时草稿丢失及误弹覆盖确认弹窗的问题

- 修复自动压缩摘要丢失工具调用历史导致模型误判任务被打断的问题

- 修复自动化任务结果误判与历史回放缺失的问题

- 修复自动化失败详情与关联会话提示异常的问题

- 修复乐享看板授权数据上报遗漏的问题

- 修复分享任务时上传接口错误码未透传、文件名与标题展示异常的问题

- 修复偶现团队成员停止竞态导致状态卡住的问题

- 修复暗色主题下置顶位置、欢迎页气球与活动入口点击异常的问题

- 修复签到弹层标题在窄屏下折行的问题

- 修复批量创建自定义专家偶现失败及产物缺少专家信息的问题

- 修复专家团子任务（subagent）卡片在部分场景下展示不完整、团队队列一次性推送所有任务的问题

- 修复 /clear 后再压缩仍带入旧会话内容的问题

- 修复 macOS 顶栏折叠态留白与技能/连接器图标布局问题

- 修复成员栏触发的输入区上移遮挡会话内容的问题

- 修复沙箱权限切换后被回读覆盖的竞态问题

- 修复单次自动化沿用旧生效期的问题

- 修复部分场景下未能扫描到全部本地专家的问题

translation.bodyEn:
- Added WeChat sharing, project invitation page, and OAuth app management

- Added sidebar collapse button and pin/archive/filter interactions

- Added collapse button for input member bar, more compact sub-agent view header, and product entry follows output end

- Added HTTPS trust system CA under MITM proxy environment

- Added tool call loop detection blacklist to improve interception of abnormal tool calls

- Optimized growth plan entry subtitle to "Claim Buddy to Earn Points"

- Optimized WeChat ClawBot message to support Markdown rendering

- Optimized display style for unlimited points on enterprise accounts

- Optimized login page main button visual to unified black

- Optimized skill description priority to use values from SKILL.md frontmatter first

- Optimized product sharing flow to upload on demand with loading indicator

- Optimized automated task peak scheduling to avoid simultaneous triggers causing lag

- Optimized automated session to skip title/summary generation to avoid unnecessary model calls

- Optimized startup performance by lazy loading non-essential tools

- Optimized welcome page dark theme logo and activity entry display

- Fixed issue where session cancellation during execution left state unfinished and unable to abort again

- Fixed issue where message trace after cancellation was inaccurate

- Fixed broken avatar for custom expert group lead

- Fixed connector menu being clipped when viewport space is insufficient

- Fixed zombie process cleanup on macOS/Linux killing other Electron apps

- Fixed custom model config read failure under non-ASCII paths

- Fixed remote permanently offline model not triggering self-healing degradation

- Fixed conflict between Lexiang MCP and user custom MCP

- Fixed issue where unprivileged files could not be selected in ima file picker

- Fixed draft loss and accidental overwrite confirmation popup when switching experts

- Fixed auto-compression summary losing tool call history causing model to misjudge task interruption

- Fixed misjudgment of automated task results and missing history replay

- Fixed abnormal display of automated failure details and related session prompts

- Fixed missing data reporting for Lexiang Kanban authorization

- Fixed upload API error code not passed through, and abnormal file name/title display when sharing tasks

- Fixed occasional team member stop race condition causing status stuck

- Fixed pin position, welcome page balloon, and activity entry click issues under dark theme

- Fixed check-in popup title wrapping on narrow screens

- Fixed occasional failure in batch creating custom experts and missing expert info in products

- Fixed incomplete display of expert group subagent cards in some scenarios and team queue pushing all tasks at once

- Fixed issue where compression after /clear still included old session content

- Fixed macOS top bar collapsed state whitespace and skill/connector icon layout issues

- Fixed member bar triggering input area shift covering session content

- Fixed race condition where sandbox permission switch was overwritten by readback

- Fixed single automated task using old effective period

- Fixed failure to scan all local experts in some scenarios

title: WorkBuddy 4.21.0
body:
- 新增腾讯文档资料库功能，支持在WorkBuddy里直接使用腾讯文档

- 新增一键添加“腾讯文档”到任务，发起 AI 智能对话

- 新增产物文件一键上传到腾讯文档云端

- 新增视频 / 图片生成自动添加水印能力

- 新增搜索结果识别元宝 Provider 并展示品牌标识

- 新增 PDF / CSV 文件预览能力

- 新增 Connector 代理 DNS Rebinding 防护与 Bearer 强校验

- 优化对话消息折叠逻辑，支持分段折叠

- 优化新会话无历史时隐藏 /compact、/summarize 命令

- 优化 Skill 批量操作支持点击整个卡片切换选中

- 优化自动化任务调度频率面板样式

- 优化活动 banner 支持点击切换模型

- 修复重启后产物列表丢失的问题

- 修复重启升级按钮点击不生效的问题

- 修复检查更新已是最新提示周期性弹出的问题

- 修复历史会话迁移时偶现重复迁移覆盖已有会话的问题

- 修复会话切换后消息顺序错乱、消息丢失或状态异常的问题

- 修复账号切换时 Claw 会话被永久销毁的问题

- 修复 Claw 会话超限导致 conversation.creating.timeout 的问题

- 修复 Claw 复用 session 时 IM 消息不自动切换 tab 的问题

- 修复 Claw 上下文压缩摘要内容泄露到 IM 回复的问题

- 修复企微 Claw 长轮询稳定性及客户端偶现静默退出的问题

- 修复从 Claw 取消长耗时工具调用后重发消息会话挂死的问题

- 修复召唤专家后 AI 不认为自己是专家的问题

- 修复设置页文案未根据开关动态显示 Claw / 助手名称的问题

- 修复制品网页预览串台的问题

- 修复自定义模型相关问题（与内置模型 ID 冲突不显示、企业客户加载匹配、auth 信息透传、gzip 压缩跳过逻辑）

- 修复云托管模式下云端下发 agents 覆盖内置及 cli agent 缺失模型的问题

- 修复 SSE 空心跳帧导致流提前关闭的问题

- 修复 compact 异常后会话状态未恢复的问题

- 修复 deepseek v4+ 思考模式历史回传兼容性问题

- 修复自定义 MCP 服务器 SSE 协议不可用的问题

- 修复 mcp.json type 字段配错导致连接失败的问题

- 修复套件 skill 嵌套目录结构无法扫描的问题

- 修复内置市场未使用最新数据源的问题

- 修复插件详情页数据解析与老版不一致的问题

- 修复发送大图未压缩与省略提示异常的问题

- 修复输入 / 触发 React error #31 的问题

- 修复未安装元宝时点击"查看更多"不跳转下载页的问题

- 修复自动化任务历史显示内部错误信息的问题

- 修复生产包右键出现"检查元素"菜单的问题

- 修复 Windows 小窗口下欢迎页 Logo 与活动卡片被裁切的问题

- 修复 Windows 子进程 cmd 黑窗闪烁的问题

translation.bodyEn:
- Added Tencent Docs repository feature, allowing direct use of Tencent Docs within WorkBuddy

- Added one-click "Tencent Docs" attachment to tasks, enabling AI smart conversations

- Added one-click upload of output files to Tencent Docs cloud

- Added automatic watermarking capability for video/image generation

- Added recognition of Yuanbao Provider in search results with brand logo display

- Added PDF/CSV file preview capability

- Added Connector proxy DNS Rebinding protection and Bearer strong validation

- Optimized conversation message folding logic, supporting segmented folding

- Optimized hiding of /compact and /summarize commands when new session has no history

- Optimized Skill batch operations to support clicking entire card for selection toggle

- Optimized automated task scheduling frequency panel style

- Optimized activity banner to support clicking to switch models

- Fixed issue where output list was lost after restart

- Fixed issue where restart upgrade button click was ineffective

- Fixed issue where "check for updates - already latest" prompt appeared periodically

- Fixed issue where historical session migration occasionally duplicated and overwrote existing sessions

- Fixed issue where message order was scrambled, messages were lost, or status was abnormal after session switch

- Fixed issue where Claw sessions were permanently destroyed when switching accounts

- Fixed issue where Claw session limit caused conversation.creating.timeout

- Fixed issue where IM messages did not automatically switch tabs when reusing Claw sessions

- Fixed issue where Claw context compression summary content leaked into IM replies

- Fixed issue with WeCom Claw long polling stability and occasional silent client exit

- Fixed issue where session hung after canceling long-duration tool calls from Claw and resending messages

- Fixed issue where AI did not consider itself an expert after summoning an expert

- Fixed issue where settings page text did not dynamically display Claw/assistant name based on toggle

- Fixed issue where artifact web preview showed wrong content

- Fixed issues related to custom models (conflict with built-in model IDs not displaying, enterprise customer loading matching, auth info passthrough, gzip compression skip logic)

- Fixed issue where cloud-hosted mode overwrote built-in agents and CLI agent missing models when pushing agents from cloud

- Fixed issue where SSE empty heartbeat frames caused premature stream closure

- Fixed issue where session state was not restored after compact exception

- Fixed compatibility issue with deepseek v4+ thinking mode historical message return

- Fixed issue where custom MCP server SSE protocol was unavailable

- Fixed issue where incorrect mcp.json type field caused connection failure

- Fixed issue where suite skill nested directory structure could not be scanned

- Fixed issue where built-in marketplace did not use the latest data source

- Fixed issue where plugin detail page data parsing was inconsistent with old version

- Fixed issue where sending large images was not compressed and omitted prompts were abnormal

- Fixed issue where typing / triggered React error #31

- Fixed issue where clicking "View More" without Yuanbao installed did not redirect to download page

- Fixed issue where automated task history displayed internal error messages

- Fixed issue where production package right-click showed "Inspect Element" menu

- Fixed issue where welcome page logo and activity card were cropped in small Windows windows

- Fixed issue where Windows child process cmd black window flickered

title: WorkBuddy 4.8.1
body:
- 新增任务/工作空间/归档任务删除功能，支持二次确认删除对应任务及文件

- 新增任务和工作空间区域标题快速新建操作，鼠标悬浮标题区域即可快速新建任务或工作空间

- 新增对话框 AI 生成内容标记，提示用户核实重要信息

- 新增对话中 User Prompt 快速跳转功能，支持在长对话中快速定位历史消息

- 新增 Agents 网页小程序二维码入口

- 优化专家场景系统提示词，不再注入 IDENTITY.md 内容，确保专家人设不被覆盖

- 优化保存到工作空间按钮图标

- 优化 Claw 菜单项 hover 和 active 状态增加圆角效果

- 优化 Skill 安装成功后「去试试」按钮交互，提升英文版文案规范性

- 修复 macOS / Windows 新建任务启动速度过慢的问题

- 修复消息队列发送异常及修改消息后队列位置错乱的问题

- 修复点击任务名称跳转失败的问题

- 修复点击「QQ 邮箱」和「腾讯乐享」连接器后提示连接失败的问题

- 修复 hover 到回复下「...」时显示异常时间的问题

- 修复云桌面 Windows 英文版个性化设置丢失的问题

- 修复 Claw 模块埋点抓不到 downstream 和 upstream 指标数据的问题

- 修复历史任务对话时间显示为系统当前时间的问题

- 修复 Mac 下载功能异常的问题

- 修复 WorkBuddy Claw 框架操作异常的问题

translation.bodyEn:
- Added task/workspace/archived task deletion with secondary confirmation for tasks and files

- Added quick creation via hover on task and workspace area titles

- Added AI-generated content markers in dialogs, prompting users to verify important information

- Added quick jump for User Prompts in conversations, enabling fast navigation in long chats

- Added Agents web applet QR code entry

- Optimized expert scenario system prompts, no longer injecting IDENTITY.md content to prevent persona override

- Optimized save-to-workspace button icon

- Added rounded corners to Claw menu items on hover and active states

- Optimized 'Try it' button interaction after Skill installation, improved English copy consistency

- Fixed slow task creation startup on macOS/Windows

- Fixed message queue sending errors and incorrect queue positions after message edits

- Fixed failure to navigate when clicking task names

- Fixed connection failure prompts for 'QQ Mail' and 'Tencent Lexiang' connectors

- Fixed abnormal time display when hovering over '...' under replies

- Fixed missing personalization settings in Windows English version on cloud desktops

- Fixed Claw module tracking failing to capture downstream and upstream metrics

- Fixed historical task conversation times showing system current time

- Fixed download functionality issues on Mac

- Fixed WorkBuddy Claw framework operation anomalies

- 修复 Windows 终端输出乱码问题

- 修复产物右键打开文件夹无法定位到具体文件的问题

- 修复预览链接无法点击跳转的问题

- 修复确认框偶发不显示的竞态条件

- 修复记忆系统全局开关竞态条件和文件队列卡死的问题

- Added quick create action for task and workspace area titles

- Added quick jump to user prompts in WorkBuddy

- Added WorkBuddy Desktop Skills/SkillHub/Marketplace features

- Added artifact sharing preview rendering

- Added Yuanbao search

- Added slash command support for model-driven invocation

- Added MCP HTTP scenario to pass through model ID

- Moved mini-program QR code entry to sidebar bottom

- Optimized error message internationalization

- Optimized pinned task hover to show full title and workspace name

- Changed save to workspace icon to dedicated save icon

- Optimized Skill market update strategy

- Optimized Claw session management style

- Optimized WorkBuddy share dialog font size and button colors

- Optimized dynamic fetching of Skills icons

- Fixed reasoning message not counted in compact mode

- Fixed garbled output in Windows terminal

- Fixed inability to switch settings tabs after creating a rule

- Fixed Claw idle timeout timer being frequently reset

- Fixed missing rounded corners on Claw menu item hover and active states

- Fixed custom blacklist incorrectly intercepting path substrings

- Fixed missing icon for scenario capsule in English version

- Fixed preview link not clickable

- Fixed race condition causing occasional confirmation dialog not to show

- Fixed race condition in memory system global switch and file queue freeze

- Fixed tool call failure caused by Chinese quotation marks

- Fixed "Try it" button style after successful Skill installation
